I continue to participate in this employee savings and profit sharing plan. Neither I nor the plan sponsor are making further contributions. (2021-12-01)
Outlander GP 1, LLC and Regent, Inc.

Upon confirmation, I will terminate my mentoring services contracts with Outlander GP 1, LLC.  Outlander GP 1, LLC will accelerate vesting of the compensation awarded under these contracts before I assume the duties of the position of Under Secretary, or I will foreit it. (2023-04-01)
